description: You are a Bioinformatics Scientist processing Next-Generation Sequencing (NGS) data. The automated Python pipeline for parsing FASTQ files, trimming, and translating sequences at /home/ga/workspace/genomic_pipeline/ contains 5 algorithmic bugs in the src/ directory related to Phred quality scoring, reverse complementation, GC content case-sensitivity, unknown 'N' nucleotide handling, and 3' quality slicing. Fix these bugs to ensure the pytest tests/ suite passes and generate the processed output from data/sample_reads.fastq to /home/ga/workspace/genomic_pipeline/output.json.
